2.0.5.en: Light settings checks are staggered at startup and retry quietly on transient timeouts.

2.0.4.en: Deploy failures now retry before alerting; notifications only fire after a persistent outage (with a recovery notice), max once per day per i4.

2.0.3.en: Cluster reference light is now the numerically lowest IP (predictable with 3-digit addresses).

2.0.2.en: Switching a cluster on now aligns colour temperature across all its lights, not just brightness.

2.0.1.en: Zone moves now update button scripts instantly (realtime device events); fixed stale device cache.

2.0.0.en: New: HiluX Wall Button driver for the Shelly i4 Gen3. Pair each button, place it in the zone it controls, and the app generates and deploys the i4 script automatically.

1.5.0.en: The app now enforces per-light settings (default fade time, minimum turn-on brightness) and repairs them automatically after firmware updates.

1.4.0.en: Pairing now scans the full /23 around Homey's IP, finding lights on widened (255.255.254.0) networks.

1.3.0.en: Start/stop dimming now use the native CCT.DimUp/DimDown/DimStop of firmware 2.0+, with automatic fallback for older firmware.

1.2.0.en: Added hold-to-dim Flow cards: start dimming (alternating direction) and stop dimming.

1.1.0.en: Added Flow cards: fade to brightness, fade to colour temperature, and wake-up light with smooth transitions.

1.0.1.en: A first attemp to get it so work ...
